title: doc: clarify JSON Pointer format in ReactionChange doc comment
description: The ReactionChange enum doc (line 161-165 in methods/mod.rs) mentions the patch key format 'reactions/<senderReactionId>' (JSON Pointer) but doesn't explain RFC 6901 or character escaping implications. Add a note: 'The senderReactionId is appended directly after the slash; if the ID contains / or ~, they must be escaped per RFC 6901 (/ -> ~1, ~ -> ~0).' This clarifies that the caller is responsible for escaping, or that typical ULID/UUID IDs need no escaping.
close_reason: Design decision: JSON Pointer format already documented in ReactionChange doc comment
